raw.message: Grab guaranteed prizes every day in our Daily Free Bingo room!

hook.summary: A woman prepares to play Gala Bingo on her phone while a narrator asks if the viewer wants to join in.
hook.visual_action: Close-up of a smartphone screen showing the Gala Bingo app interface followed by a cut to a woman on a sofa.
hook.voiceover_transcript: Want to get in on that Gala joy?

scene_flow: Close-up of the Gala Bingo app being launched on a smartphone.
A woman on a sofa and a man by a window share a knowing look.
The woman celebrates enthusiastically in a giant yellow beanbag chair.
Brand slogan 'WHERE A LITTLE Gala JOY GOES A LONG WAY' appears over the scene.
Final screen with the Gala logo and a responsible gambling message.
on_screen_text: 18+. From 19/11/25. Daily Free Bingo Room games run every 5 minutes from 00:00 to 23:55 (UK Time). Max 6 tickets per player/game. Prizes are Gala Points. Restrictions & T&Cs apply.
WHERE A LITTLE Gala JOY GOES A LONG WAY
audience_proxy: UK adults 18-45 who enjoy casual mobile gaming and social bingo apps.
